description_long: This handbag features a structured, slightly tapered rectangular body with a bold black and white geometric pattern reminiscent of traditional Ikat designs. The exterior is made of a textile or synthetic fabric, bordered and reinforced with black piping along the edges for added durability and style. It has a single, long, thin black strap, allowing it to be worn as a shoulder or crossbody bag, with the strap attached at the upper corners. The bag appears to have a top opening, likely secured by a zipper or magnetic closure, though the exact mechanism is not fully visible. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, suitable for urban environments and casual outings. There are no visible brand logos or additional decorative elements, keeping the focus on the striking pattern.
description: A structured handbag with a black and white geometric pattern, black piping, and a long black strap for shoulder or crossbody wear. The design is modern and minimalistic, with no visible logos or extra decorations.
description_view_0: Side view showing the slim profile of the handbag and the attachment of the long black strap.
description_view_1: Back view highlighting the full geometric pattern and the way the strap loops around the bag.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the slimness and the strap's attachment, with a slight view of the top opening.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the geometric pattern prominently and the symmetrical shape of the bag.
attribute_strap_type: Single long black strap, suitable for shoulder or crossbody wear, non-adjustable, attached at upper corners.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Top closure, likely zipper or magnetic snap, not fully visible but implied by the structure.
attribute_pattern: Black and white geometric pattern resembling Ikat or diamond motifs.
